name: awesome-selfhosted
description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers
readmeExcerpt: Self-hosting is the practice of hosting and managing applications on your own server(s) instead of consuming from SaaSS providers.

summary.text: awesome-selfhosted is a open-source project focused on A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers. It is tagged with awesome, awesome-list, and cloud.
